payment.note: Text Mike the final result. Cash prizes are a birthday gift from Mike, not from Playable Greetings.

memoryBonus.title: ❤️ A Moment to Remember
memoryBonus.message:
My little baby Gloria,

I loved you from the moment I held you, and that love never left. Every birthday, every smile, every laugh — I am still close in your heart. When you hear the slot bells ring, think of me smiling and cheering for you. Happy Birthday, my Gloria. You are loved forever.

Love, Mom / Grandma Rosie

subtitle: Where hope spins, Gloria wins, and Ralph's audit department is respectfully ignored.
bigline: Happy Birthday, Mom. Press SPIN for laughs, love, and maybe a prize from Mike.

welcome.title: Welcome, Gloria!
paragraphs: This is your official birthday slot machine from Mike.
You get 5 official spins. Some spins win cash. Some spins win laughs. All spins are rigged in favor of the birthday girl.
If the bonus round appears, do not panic. The house is simply admitting Gloria deserves more.
welcome.overrideLine: Important casino rule: Ralph may review the results, but his approval is not required.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Guaranteed minimum birthday love: unlimited. Guaranteed minimum comedy: Ralph.

rules: The house does not win today.
Ralph's fact-checking is permitted, but all disputed memories are settled in favor of Gloria.
Text Mike the final result to claim the birthday prize.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Birthday Result
finale.note: Official game: best cash win from the birthday spins counts. Replay resets the casino because Gloria deserves another round.
finale.shareButton: Text / Share My Win With Mike
finale.restartButton: 🔄 Play Again — Ralph Demands a Recount

footer: Made with love for Gloria. No quarters required. No actual casino harmed. Ralph may have to buy dinner.

customerInputs.oneThingEveryoneKnows: Gloria deserves the win and Ralph's audit never stands.

prizes.title: 🍔 Birthday Cheeseburger Cash
prizes.msg: Gloria wins $5 toward a McDonald's double cheeseburger or Big Mac. Ralph may not audit the pickles, onions, or special sauce.

prizes.title: 👑 Queen Gloria Bonus
prizes.msg: Gloria wins $15 because Birthday Casino recognizes her as the rightful ruler of the day.

prizes.title: 🧾 Ralph Audit Override
prizes.msg: Gloria wins $20. Ralph attempted to pause the payout for review. Request denied by Birthday Casino.

prizes.title: 🎂 Birthday Bonus
prizes.msg: Gloria wins $25 because birthday rules override household budget committee rules.

prizes.title: 💸 Zelle Zone
prizes.msg: Gloria wins $50. Text Mike before Ralph moves the money to a safer location.

prizes.title: 7️⃣ Lucky Seven Jackpot
prizes.msg: JACKPOT. Gloria wins $100. Ralph is advised to remain calm and not ask where this money came from.

prizes.title: 🎥 Slot Stream Shout-Out
prizes.msg: Internet Skater Brandon interrupts the broadcast to wish Gloria a Happy Birthday and reminds everyone that you never know when the bonus is coming, so keep chasing one more spin.

prizes.title: 🕊️ A Loving Message From Grandma Rosie
prizes.msg: A loving birthday message from Grandma Rosie appears.

prizes.title: 🧾 Ralph Receipt Check
prizes.msg: No cash this spin, but Ralph is currently reviewing the payout. Estimated approval time is 3 to 5 business years.

prizes.title: 😂 Laughter Jackpot
prizes.msg: No cash this spin, but Gloria wins the right to laugh while Ralph explains something no one asked about.

prizes.title: 🍔 Cheeseburger Break
prizes.msg: Gloria wins one double cheeseburger break. Ralph buys. Mike approves.

prizes.title: 📜 Official Ruling
prizes.msg: All disputed memories shall be settled in favor of the birthday girl. This ruling is final unless Gloria changes the story later.
